<includeonly> 
{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%;"
|-
! colspan="2" style="font-size:160%; background:#2d5fa4; color:white;" | {{{name|Web4 Project}}}
|-
! Description
| {{{description|No description provided.}}}
|-
! Version
| {{{version|1.0.0}}}
|-
! Status
| {{{status|Stable}}}
|-
! License
| {{{license|Apache-2.0}}}
|-
! Author
| {{{author|Seriki Walter Yakub}}}
|-
! Homepage
| {{{homepage|—}}}
|-
! Repository
| {{{repository|—}}}
|-
! Documentation
| {{{documentation|[[Documentation]]}}}
|-
! API
| {{{api|—}}}
|-
! Language
| {{{language|Multiple}}}
|-
! Platform
| {{{platform|Cross-platform}}}
|-
! Dependencies
| {{{dependencies|None}}}
|-
! Category
| {{{category|Web4}}}
|}

== Overview ==

{{{overview|No overview has been provided.}}}

== Features ==

{{{features|
* Modular
* API-first
* Extension Support
* Cross-platform
* Wikixedia Integration
}}}

== Architecture ==

<pre>
        Client
           │
           ▼
     MediaWiki Core
           │
           ▼
      Wikixedia Engine
           │
      ┌────┼────┐
      ▼    ▼    ▼
   Parser API Search
      │    │    │
      ▼    ▼    ▼
     HTML JSON Database
</pre>

== Installation ==

{{{installation|
# Download the extension.
# Place it in the extensions directory.
# Add the required configuration to LocalSettings.php.
# Run update.php.
}}}

== Usage ==

{{{usage|No usage instructions available.}}}

== Related Pages ==

* [[Getting Started]]
* [[Installation]]
* [[Architecture]]
* [[API Reference]]
* [[Extensions]]

[[Category:{{{category|Web4}}}]]
</includeonly>

<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
